articles.title: Uttam Nagar violence: Mehbooba Mufti seeks PM Modi's intervention ahead of Id
articles.description: Mehbooba Mufti urged the Prime Minister and Union Home Minister Amit Shah to intervene "before the situation worsens, leading to loss of innocent lives.”

articles.title: These AI notetaking devices can help you record and transcribe your meetings
articles.description: These physical notetakers transcribe audio and give users summaries and action items of meetings using AI. Some even offer live translation.

articles.title: Amazon is making a smartphone again, it will be big on AI
articles.description: Amazon is making a smartphone again it will be big on AI

articles.title: ‘Aadu 3’ movie review: Flogging a dead goat through multiple timelines
articles.description: Despite its ambitious scope and comedic potential, the nearly three-hour movie only offers a series of character introductions rather than a cohesive narrative, ultimately leaving viewers yearning for a more coherent narrative and a satisfying conclusion

topStories.title: Assam BJP drops 19 sitting MLAs, fields ex-Congress leaders in key seats
topStories.description: BJP drops 19 sitting MLAs, including Atul Bora, and fields several former Congress leaders as it reshapes its Assam poll strategy across 88 seats

topStories.title: Mexican teen dies while being held in US immigration custody
topStories.description: Royer Perez-Jimenez died amid a surge of migrant deaths under Donald Trump's immigration crackdown.

topStories.title: Fight against hate speech must be on behalf of all, and not just limited to one’s own community: Supreme Court
topStories.description: Justice Nagarathna said the court was against the phenomenon of hate speech, whether it was targeted at one or the other community

topStories.title: Who was Ali Mohammad Naini? Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Spokesperson killed in US strike
topStories.description: General Ali Mohammad Naini, spokesperson for Iran's Revolutionary Guards, was killed in US-Israeli strikes. A veteran of the Iran-Iraq war, he served since 2024 and was noted for his role in psychological warfare, remaining defiant against the US and Israel.

topStories.title: Trump makes Pearl Harbor remark in meeting with Japan's PM
topStories.description: President Trump compared US strikes on Iran to the deadly 1941 Japanese attack and declaration of war as part of World War Two.

topStories.title: Long before Trump: How US policy has harmed the environment for decades
topStories.description: Environment advocacy groups are suing the US government over climate change policy rollback.

topStories.title: Assembly elections 2026 LIVE: TMC MP moves Calcutta HC over transfer of IAS, IPS officers by EC soon after poll announcement
topStories.description: Congress finalises its alliance with Raijor Dal in the Assam Assembly elections after weeks of deadlock

topStories.title: ‘It helps us survive’: Poverty forces children into mine work in DR Congo
topStories.description: Congolese authorities say 70 children died in a landslide at the Rubaya mine, source of much of the world’s coltan.

topStories.title: Three charged in the US with smuggling AI chips into China
topStories.description: US charges men reportedly tied to Super Micro Computer for helping to smuggle billions of dollars' worth of AI chips.

topStories.title: After Pradyut Bordoloi's Congress exit, his son bows out of Assam election race
topStories.description: A political debutant, Prateek was named by the Congress as its candidate for Margherita, a seat his father had represented in the assembly for four terms.

topStories.title: Quote of the Day by Sun Tzu: ‘All warfare is based on deception. Hence, when we are able to attack, we must…’
topStories.description: While none of us plans to wage a war, the philosophy behind Sun Tzu's quote lies a single, uncomfortable truth: Deception is not a bug in the system; it is the system.

topStories.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 21 of US-Israel attacks?
topStories.description: Tehran has warned of zero restraint if energy facilities are attacked again, while Netanyahu points to ground operation.

dailyNews.description: Tehran has warned of zero restraint if energy facilities are attacked again, while Netanyahu points to ground operation.

dailyNews.title: Rs 1 lakh crore wiped off! Bajaj Finance shares tumble 18% in March so far amid raging Iran-US war
dailyNews.description: Bajaj Finance shares have plunged over 20% in a month, eroding more than Rs 1 lakh crore in market value amid escalating Iran-US tensions. Rising oil prices, inflation concerns and macroeconomic risks flagged by Moody’s have weighed on sentiment, dragging financial stocks lower and keeping investors cautious amid ongoing geopolitical uncertainty.

dailyNews.title: Iran War Underscores the Diverging Aims of U.S. and Israel
dailyNews.description: The United States views Iran through a prism of global responsibilities and strategic goals. Israel has a more regional approach. After nearly three weeks of war, their paths are diverging.

dailyNews.title: A Diary of War From an Unlikely Author: the Son of Iran’s President
dailyNews.description: In an online journal, Yousef Pezeshkian offers readers a mix of personal anecdotes and glimpses behind the scenes as Iranian leaders are picked off one after another.

dailyNews.title: Scramble for Jet Fuel Shows How Energy Shortages Are Rippling Across Asia
dailyNews.description: As China and other major suppliers of refined oil in the region restrict exports, import-dependent countries are desperate to secure fuel supplies.

dailyNews.title: Silicon Valley’s Big Bets on War Pay Off, and the Trump Family Business Looks to Transylvania
dailyNews.description: Plus, a buzzy new book was just canceled over A.I. allegations.

dailyNews.title: Trump Organization Eyes Transylvania Golf Course Deal
dailyNews.description: The president’s company is eyeing a site for a golf course and luxury apartments. Will a huge landfill and a troubled project history stand in the way?

dailyNews.title: Using Charm and Restraint, Japan’s Leader Mostly Avoids Trump’s Wrath
dailyNews.description: During her first visit to the White House, Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi drew praise from President Trump. But the war in the Middle East will test their relationship.

dailyNews.title: How Japan Reacted to Trump’s Pearl Harbor Joke
dailyNews.description: Some people criticized President Trump’s decision to invoke a painful chapter of history. Others worried it might harm U.S.-Japan relations.

dailyNews.title: Handcuffs, Tents and Pleas for Medical Care: Pregnant in ICE Detention
dailyNews.description: Women describe conditions that violate longstanding agency guidelines for how pregnant detainees should be treated.

dailyNews.title: New Data Shows Where ICE Has Been Most Active This Year
dailyNews.description: The pace of ICE arrests nationwide has topped 1,100 per day on average in 2026, but the rate of arrests has varied across the country in sometimes surprising ways.

dailyNews.title: ICE Released Hundreds of Children from Immigration Detention
dailyNews.description: About 50 children were in federal detention in Dilley, Texas this week, down from about 500 in January. It is unclear how many were deported, but some are back at their U.S. schools.

dailyNews.title: Nashville Reporter Released From ICE Custody
dailyNews.description: Estefany Maria Rodriguez Florez, who works for a Spanish-language outlet, was released on bond in a case that has raised concerns about press freedom.

topStories.description: Cuban exiles in Miami's Little Havana say they feel hope as Cuba faces island-wide blackouts, protests and Trump's remarks about "taking Cuba."

topStories.title: White House unveils its first national AI framework, pushes Congress to act 'this year'
topStories.description: EXCLUSIVE: The White House unveiled its first national AI policy framework, pushing Congress to establish one national standard to protect free speech and children.

topStories.title: Democrats vow political reckoning if they win midterms as campaign season heats up
topStories.description: Democrats threaten to break up major mergers and launch congressional investigations against Trump-aligned companies if they regain power after midterms.

topStories.description: The Heritage Foundation's 2026 Index of Economic Freedom finds nations embracing free markets, like Singapore and Ireland, outperform socialist economies.

dailyNews.title: Not just tariffs: Foreign nations profited off of us — now Trump is striking back
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration's efforts to defend American intellectual property rights from foreign abusers may prove as impactful as its tariff policy.

dailyNews.title: Pence backs Trump’s Iran strikes, says president ‘ignored’ GOP isolationists
dailyNews.description: Exclusive: Mike Pence praises Trump's Iran strikes in new interview, says president ignored isolationist Republicans to launch Operation Epic Fury.

dailyNews.title: Media under fire: Journalists keep questioning Iran war as Hegseth calls them ‘unpatriotic’ and ‘anti-Trump’
dailyNews.description: War Secretary Pete Hegseth slams media coverage of Iran conflict as "dishonest" while President Donald Trump reportedly rebukes Israeli allies over gas field bombing.

dailyNews.title: No sign of U.S. and Israel's war with Iran easing on eve of 3-week mark
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration says Iran's autocratic regime is down but not out, and it won't say how long the deadly, costly conflict will go on.

dailyNews.title: Federal commission made up of Trump appointees approves design of his gold coin
dailyNews.description: The vote by the U.S. Commission of Fine Arts, whose members are supporters of the president and were appointed by him earlier this year, was without objection.

dailyNews.title: Trump brings up Pearl Harbor while meeting with Japan's prime minister
dailyNews.description: Asked why the U.S. didn't inform allies ahead of the Iran strikes, President Trump said, "Who knows better about surprise than Japan?"

dailyNews.title: Trump invokes emergency powers with $23 billion in Gulf arms sales as Iran war wages on: WSJ report
dailyNews.description: The U.S. approved roughly $23 billion in weapons sales to three Gulf nations, moving to bolster their defenses as the Middle East war continued to escalate.

dailyNews.title: Trump invokes Pearl Harbor in front of Japanese prime minister to defend Iran attack secrecy
dailyNews.description: During the meeting, Trump praised Japan for "stepping up" to assist in efforts to secure the Strait of Hormuz, "unlike NATO."

dailyNews.title: Netanyahu says Iran is being 'decimated' but revolution requires 'ground component'
dailyNews.description: Netanyahu's comments came after President Donald Trump, speaking in the Oval Office, said earlier that he would not send U.S. troops to the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.
